analytics.last_inbound_snippet: Subject: Accepted: Dynamic Beauty X Zoca | Check In October\n\nBody:

messages.body: Alright Shrina, I’ll inform the team!
Shrina,  I’d love to show you some data to see how the profile has gotten better. We see that the optimisation is working well with the SEO.   Would you be available for a call tomorrow?
Sorry Monisha the decision has been made. Please ensure bo further payments are taken for the next month
Hi all Happy Diwali and Sal Mubarak, i hope you all enjoyed the celebrations.

Hey Shrina,  Hope you’re doing well! :)  We’ve cancelled the bot and there won’t be charges towards it.   However, I see that you have been getting clients through local Seo and your Google optimisation and we are consta…
I also havent seen a significant enough increase from before, infact it feels like less
Hi Monisha, I understand this however its bot enough to justify the price. Also its not easy to contact them back via Zoca

I have just had a reminder for the next payment, however i would like to stop the google side too before this payment comes out. I do not feel i am getting enough return from it. So unfortunately do not wish to continue …
Its just not financially viable as not enough are converting

Hi, I hope you’re doing well!  I just wanted to share a quick update — we’re celebrating a major Indian festival, and our team will be on leave from October 18th to 22nd. During this time, I may not be able to schedule m…
Hello Shrina,  Yes, the BOT has been deactivated
Hi Monisha, sorry Sundays and Mondays are my days off and for my kids so i try not to do work stuff. I will be back in tomorrow and free between 2pm and 4.30pm.
Do why are clients still receiving messages?
Hey Shrina,  Hope you’re doing well!   No worries! I informed Ashish and I will get back to you. Hopefully, we can do this tomorrow.
Hi thanks for confirming the meeting. Once again can i request everything is switched off please. There should be no responses to leads
So we also send automated messages to your clients as soon as they fill in their details in the lead form and hit on “Book now”.   The BOT is also deactivated
We can do tomorrow at 4 pm. Here’s the link - http://meet.google.com/xja-kcnh-jtd
Hello Shrina,  We’ve refunded the total amount you paid us towards the bot. Please check :)
Subject: Accepted: Dynamic Beauty X Zoca | Check In October\n\nBody:
